title: The Kozuki Retainers Reveal the Truth
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Zoro, Kiku, Unknown person #12, Garp, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14 as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kinemon explains the Kozuki tragedy, the twenty-year leap, and the mission to overthrow Kaido and Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Look!! I've been practicing with this sword!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, Momo!! So you're here too. Is the old dog guy here as well?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord MOMONOSUKE!! I'M glad to see that you're safe!!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: MM!! It's been a while, Kiku.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh!? "Momo"? Wait a minute, Luffytaro... That's rude!! He's the....

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Ah, it's fine, I kiku!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Heeeeeee eyyy!!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Well, if it isn't luffy...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Luuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm so glad that you're all right...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, well, it looks like you guys were able to retrieve Sanji-Dono!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oh, hey, every- one!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: O-Nami--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You guys are super late!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We searched ALL OVER for you!! We even went to the bottom of the ocean to look for you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Luuuufy!! Garchu-!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were able to find your Vivre card,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we knew that you were alive, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then we finally got in touch with kin'emon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yo- hoho!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh... you guys made it. How's Bepo doing?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's currently hiding in the bushes, and unable to come out because of his diarrhea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Every single one of you are...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, first things first. Let's head inside to talk.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's safe food in there, straight from the farm that we stole from.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So it was you!! The thief that they were talking about!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ahahahaha!! What a dirty house!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My apologies, but these ruins will have to be our base of op- erations for the time being....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you all for taking the time to come here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...First of all... in regards to Lord Momono- Suke,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is one thing that we have been keeping from you that I should tell you before we proceed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You guys have way too many secrets.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry up and spill it!! You're holding back too much!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Well, that's because... I'm so sorry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But even if I tell you, I don't think you're going to believe me....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...there's Kanjuro and Raiza, whom you are all familiar with. In addition to the three of us that are here, we add up to a total of 5 people!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll put it bluntly. We have come from the past....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The truth is...!! We came from the Wano Country of 20 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: By travelling forward in time!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WHATA AAAAA AT!!??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: An Earth- Shattering Revelation!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 41 dialogue beats. The Kozuki retainers reveal that Wano’s rebellion has been carried twenty years into the future.
